summary.key_theme: Amazon 透過與 Cerebras 合作強化 AI 雲端運算能力，並藉由調漲 Prime Video 訂閱費與擴大歐洲數據中心投資，展現強勁的營收成長動能與市場主導地位。

bullish.title: AWS and Cerebras Collaboration Aims to Set a New Standard for AI Inference Speed and Performance in the Cloud
bullish.reason: AWS 與 Cerebras 合作部署晶圓級 AI 晶片，顯著提升 AI 推論速度，有助於鞏固其在雲端 AI 市場的競爭優勢。

bullish.title: Amazon.com (AMZN) to Invest €33.7B in Spanish Data Center Expansion
bullish.reason: 高達 337 億歐元的巨額投資顯示 Amazon 對歐洲雲端基礎設施的長期承諾，將進一步擴大 AWS 的市佔率。

bullish.title: Win for Amazon as Luxembourg court scraps record $854 million privacy fine
bullish.reason: 法院撤銷了高達 8.54 億美元的隱私罰款，直接改善了公司的財務狀況並消除了潛在的法律負擔。

bullish.title: Amazon's Zoox partners with Uber to reach more robotaxi riders
bullish.reason: Zoox 與 Uber 的合作將加速自動駕駛計程車的商業化落地，為 Amazon 開拓新的營收增長點。

bullish.title: Are Amazon and Alphabet Among the Best Stocks to Buy Now?
bullish.reason: 市場分析指出雲端業務的強勁成長，進一步強化了投資人對 Amazon 作為藍籌股的信心。

bearish.title: Amazon to hike price of ad-free Prime Video tier by $2 a month
bearish.reason: 雖然調漲價格有助於營收，但可能導致部分對價格敏感的用戶流失，並面臨消費者對訂閱成本上升的負面情緒。

bearish.title: FCC chair slams Amazon for slow satellite launches after it opposed SpaceX data center plan
bearish.reason: FCC 主席公開批評 Amazon 衛星部署進度緩慢，且與 SpaceX 的競爭引發監管壓力，可能影響其衛星網路計畫的執行。

bearish.title: Update: Market Chatter: Amazon's European Unit Could Face Trial in Italy Over Alleged Tax Evasion
bearish.reason: 涉及義大利的稅務逃漏指控可能導致罰款或商譽受損，需持續關注後續法律程序。

neutral.title: Stock-Split Follow-up: How Nvidia, Alphabet, Amazon, Netflix, and Tesla Have Performed Since Their Historic Splits
neutral.reason: 回顧股票分割後的表現，屬於中性的市場歷史分析，對短期股價無直接影響。

neutral.title: 27-year-old Amazon employee relocated from India to Ireland and spends up to $2,927 a month
neutral.reason: 僅為員工個人生活經驗分享，對公司整體營運或財務表現無實質影響。
